title: night-skip
description: Mod for night skip! Set the percentage of players needed for skip in the config!
body:
### Mod for skipping nights when the percentage of players specified in the config is asleep!
- Unlike similar mods, it does not reset the calendar, which gives compatibility with many time-based mods!
- Supports displaying the current year (the year can be synchronized with the Vinery mod)
- Customization of messages upon awakening!
